title: The Glass Castle
writer: Vicki Baum, Gian Bistolfi, Pierre Bost
actors: Michèle Morgan, Jean Marais, Jean Servais
plot: Evelyne, the young wife of Judge Bertal, falls in love with Remy, who lives in Paris, during a holiday in Italy. After following him in the lovers city, she realizes Remy is the one she really loves, she decides to return home to ...
